raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "dark_box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the dark box; adjacent light_box and the cup are not in the lateral pinch zone; enough clearance exists to slide end-effectors between boxes without contacting the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is constrained laterally by both end-effectors, preventing it from shifting while establishing a secure support grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "dark_box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The dark box is already stabilized; the end-effectors are centered on opposing side faces with sufficient friction contact; no objects (light_box/cup) will be collided with during initial lift.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is securely held between both end-effectors and is no longer resting on the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the dark box; adjacent light_box and the cup are not in the lateral pinch zone; enough clearance exists to slide end-effectors between boxes without contacting the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is constrained laterally by both end-effectors, preventing it from shifting while establishing a secure support grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: The dark box is already stabilized; the end-effectors are centered on opposing side faces with sufficient friction contact; no objects (light_box/cup) will be collided with during initial lift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is securely held between both end-effectors and is no longer resting on the table.
